data.title: Integrate escalation routing into fix-bug SKILL.md
data.description:
Add escalation routing section to fix-bug SKILL.md after all gate sections.

The section:
- Collects all gate signal JSON outputs into array
- Passes array + --complex flag to gate-escalation-router.py
- Routes:
  - auto-fix -> proceed without dialog
  - dialog -> prompt 1-2 inline questions with blast radius annotation
  - escalate -> escalate to /dso:brainstorm with all evidence
- Interactivity: when non-interactive, defers dialog/escalation as INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED comment
- Error handling: router failure -> route:dialog (fail toward user interaction, never auto-fix on error)
- References gate-signal-schema.md contract

TDD: GREEN -- implement until Task 3 tests pass.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All RED tests pass
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && python -m pytest tests/skills/test_fix_bug_escalation_routing.py -q
- [ ] SKILL.md contains routing section
  Verify: grep -qi 'escalation routing' plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md
- [ ] References router script
  Verify: grep -q 'gate-escalation-router' plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md
- [ ] Documents all three paths
  Verify: grep -q 'auto-fix' plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md && grep -q 'brainstorm' plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md
